name: Eclipse Mosquitto
independence_note: Mature independent MQTT broker and client library used as a primary MQTT pilot target.
build_instructions: To be filled during implementation setup after pinning a version.
run_instructions: Use broker plus mosquitto_pub/sub or raw TCP MQTT packets.
test_input_method: mosquitto_pub/sub, raw Python socket, or packet-builder scripts.
notes: Related seed CVEs include CVE-2023-0809, CVE-2023-28366, CVE-2021-34431, and CVE-2024-10525 for libmosquitto.
